name: Peak Guardian
text: When you play me, buff me. Then, if I am at a battlefield, buff all other friendly units there. (To buff a unit, give it a +1 :rb_might: buff if it doesn't already have one.)
text_rich: When you play me, buff me. Then, if I am at a battlefield, buff all other friendly units there. (To buff a unit, give it a +1 :rb_might: buff if it doesn't already have one.)
accessibility_text: Riftbound Unit: Peak Guardian. When you play me, buff me. Then, if I am at a battlefield, buff all other friendly units there. (To buff a unit, give it a +1 [S] buff if it doesn't already have one.)
